raw_consumer_statement: Someone charged my Sears Citibank credit card for {$980.00} from XXXX XXXX XXXX my mother called Sears since its her account Im just an authorized user and told them about the fraudulent charges and cancelled the credit card they said they would investigate the issue and let her know when they have resolved it and they had her sign about XXXX pages of the charges stating she nor I made those charges and they would remove the charges and her balance would be {$0.00} and which they accept for {$160.00} in which they said those were new charges from XXXX and I dont know how thats possible since the credit card was cancelled in XX/XX/year> and then they charged back her account the full {$980.00} stating I made those charges but they have no proof of that and I did not make them I didnt even have the card or the card numbers to make those purchases how can a company do this my mother can not pay {$980.00} and nor should she have to when they are FRAUDULENT CHARGES please help
